title: karpatiosorbus holubyana
intro: Karpatiosorbus holubyana, also known as the Holuby's service tree, is a rare deciduous shrub or small tree native to the Western Carpathian Mountains. It belongs to the Rosaceae family, with its medicinal properties attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids in its leaves, bark, and roots. The health benefits of Karpatiosorbus holubyana include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, infections, and digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Karpatiosorbus holubyana include tea, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
